name: Phantom Knights' Sword
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻影剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ファントム・ソード</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Activate this card by targeting 1 face-up monster on the field; it gains 800 ATK, also if that target would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can destroy this card instead. When it leaves the field, destroy this card. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "The Phantom Knights" monster in your GY; Special Summon it, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Phantom Knights' Sword" once per turn.
eff: Activate this card by targeting 1 face-up monster on the field; it gains 800 ATK, also if that target would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can destroy this card instead. When it leaves the field, destroy this card. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "The Phantom Knights" monster in your GY; Special Summon it, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Phantom Knights' Sword" once per turn.

mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
Banishes other cards when they leave the field
